name: Reflex Plus Maxi Breed Dog Food Lamb & Rice 18Kg
description: Reflex Plus Lamb and Rice Maxi Breed Adult Dog Food is a super-premium dry dog food with lamb and rice, fully and balanced formulated for large breed adult dogs. Xylo-oligosaccharides (XOS) are super prebiotics obtained by hydrolyzing corn cobs. With approximately zero calorie value, XOS helps reduce problems such as unwanted fatness and glycemia in cats. XOS enters the large intestine unmodified and is used primarily by the digestive bacteria Bifidobacteria and Lactobacilli. This reduces negative fermentations that cause energy loss, such as bloating and other digestive disorders. Possible Health Benefits: • Strengthens the immune system. • It improves the digestion and metabolism of nutrients by improving the intestinal flora. • Natural antioxidant is effective. Processed Lamb Protein, Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Chicken Fat, Rice, Sugar Beet, Liver Flavor, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharide, Brewer's Yeast, Flaxseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Preservatives - Antioxidants. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D3, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (Niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (Biotin) - B9 (Folic Acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. Nutrient Components Crude Protein 25% Fat Content 14% Ash 8% Crude Cellulose 2.5%   Nutritious Supplements Vitamin A (3A672A) 18,000 IU/kg Vitamine D3 (3A671) 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E (3A700) 150mg/kg Vitamin C (3A300) 200mg/kg
